steps.t: The traders' pavillion can be found to the south of the Mead Hall of Middlemead. Mágla has asked you to take inventory of currently stocked goods in M…
Hildulf can be found on the raised platform at the traders' pavillion. You have noted the stock of Middlemead and should now speak to Hildulf.
The manifest can be found near Hildulf in the traders' pavillion of Middlemead. You have spoken to Hildulf and should now take the manifest and return…
Mágla can be found inside the Mead Hall of Middlemead. You have obtained Hildulf's manifest and should now present it to Thane Mágla.
